summary: Tested Document Stamping page fixes: 1) Transparent stamp backgrounds with white only behind content - WORKING, 2) Smooth drag on document preview using Rnd onDrag - WORKING, 3) Input field responsiveness - NO LAG, 4) Position/Margin fields REMOVED from UI, 5) All Pages stamping option - WORKING with all 3 pages, 6) TLS Logo in rectangle stamp header - VISIBLE, 7) Multi-page PDF stamping - WORKING

minor.issue: Correct endpoint is /api/verify/stamp/{stamp_id} - minor documentation issue

backend_api_tests: Advocate login with test credentials - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Login and navigate to Dashboard - PASS
Navigate to Document Stamp page - PASS

All Pages (3) button visible and clickable - PASS
'Stamp will appear on all 3 pages' message - PASS
Circle stamp preview with transparent background - PASS
Rectangle stamp preview with TLS logo in header - PASS
Stamp dragging works smoothly (position changes) - PASS

feature_verification.transparent_backgrounds: WORKING - stamp shows document through transparent areas, white only behind QR/text
feature_verification.smooth_dragging: WORKING - Rnd onDrag moves stamp position immediately (726→826)
feature_verification.input_responsiveness: WORKING - fast typing captured without lag
feature_verification.position_margin_removed: CONFIRMED - no Position Preset dropdown or Margin slider in UI
feature_verification.all_pages_stamping: WORKING - All Pages (3) button shows confirmation message
feature_verification.tls_logo_rectangle: VISIBLE - TLS logo shown in rectangle stamp header (blue square with TLS text)
feature_verification.multipage_pdf: WORKING - 3-page PDF uploaded, 3 pages detected, stamping works

critical_code_review_comments: Rnd component correctly uses onDrag={(e, d) => setStampPosition({ x: d.x, y: d.y })} for smooth dragging (line 1153)
enableResizing={false} to prevent resize handles interfering with drag (line 1167)
stampPositionPreset and stampMargin state variables exist but their setters are unused - UI controls removed
Page selection logic in getPagesToStamp() correctly generates [1,2,3] for 'all' selection
Backend embed_stamp_in_pdf correctly loops through pages_to_stamp_0indexed to apply stamp to multiple pages

success_rate.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - verify endpoint path minor issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test stamps with TEST_ prefix during testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Transparent stamp backgrounds implemented with white only behind content elements (QR code, text, logo), 2) Drag functionality uses Rnd's onDrag for smooth real-time position updates, 3) Input fields use local state for responsive typing, 4) Position Preset and Margin UI controls removed (state vars unused), 5) All Pages option correctly generates pages array [1,2,3] for multi-page stamping, 6) TLS logo visible in rectangle stamp header. Test file at /tmp/test_multipage.pdf (3 pages).

transparent_stamp_backgrounds.ui_message: 'Stamps have transparent background with white only behind QR code and text for optimal readability'
